generated_oml:
instance SteeringController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for lower-level chassis steering and speed control"
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano executing real-time ACC computation and converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection in the physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for 3D environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraPointCloudData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors capturing ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and detected objects in proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:transmittedVia WiFiNetwork
]

instance DepthCameraPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:transmittedVia WiFiNetwork
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleStateSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:transmittedVia WiFiNetwork
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:producedVia DBSCANFiltering, KalmanTracking
    DTDFVocab:transmittedVia ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:transmissionFrequency 100ms
]

instance LiDARProcessingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization and LiDAR point cloud processing using DBSCAN/Kalman filtering"
]

instance SQLObjectTrackingDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing detected object tracks (position, velocity) and ego vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData, VehicleStateData
]

instance RealTimeLiDARStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time stream of LiDAR data processed via DBSCAN/Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance EgoVehicleStateStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time stream of ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance ObjectTrackStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time stream of detected object tracks (position, velocity)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance TimeSeriesReports : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series reports generated from SQL database for ACC system efficiency monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SQLObjectTrackingDatabase
    DTDFVocab:generatedVia ReportingEnabler
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based middleware for intra-vehicle communication (intra-entity) and inter-entity communication via Wi-Fi network"
    DTDFVocab:clockSynchronization 100ms
]

instance DBSCANFiltering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for object detection from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackData
]

instance KalmanTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for tracking detected objects from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackData
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Collection Feature Module for real-time state data aggregation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, PresentationFE
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Feature Module handling unit conversions and filtering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, PresentationFE
    DTDFVocab:uses DBSCANFiltering, KalmanTracking
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Feature Module ensuring inter-entity compatibility"
    DTDFVocab:enables SQLObjectTrackingDatabase
]

instance PresentationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Presentation Feature Module for generating visualizations and reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables 3DVisualizationFE, ReportingEnabler
]

instance 3DVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Feature Module using ROS2-based 3D cockpit for real-time rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:uses JetsonOrinNanoActuator
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for generating time-series reports from SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control Panel Feature Module for remote management of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation from vehicle ECUs to cloud/DT, reducing resource constraints on Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:provides ResourceOptimizationAction
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to remotely enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, PathProjectionInsight
]

instance TroubleshootingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data collection for developers to diagnose design flaws or hardware issues during design/validation phases"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalReportInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
]

instance PathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving path based on detected objects and ego vehicle state"
]

instance ResourceOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reducing computational load on Jetson Orin Nano by offloading ACC processing to cloud/DT"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC parameters (e.g., desired speed) by operators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggering emergency braking commands via Control Panel FE"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HistoricalReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical time-series reports for diagnosing ACC system efficiency and design flaws"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SteeringController, JetsonOrinNanoActuator,
                 HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, EgoVehicleStateSensor,
                 ROS2Middleware, DataCollectionFE, DataPreProcessingFE,
                 PresentationFE, 3DVisualizationFE, ReportingEnabler,
                 ControlPanelFE, ComputationOffloadingService,
                 RemoteManagementService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Domain-specific extension grouping hardware-specific functionalities (sensor processing, actuation) for modularity"
    base:contains SteeringController, JetsonOrinNanoActuator,
                 HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, EgoVehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single centralized Digital Twin Entity with no internal multiplicities"
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, DataCollectionFE, DataPreProcessingFE,
                 DataTranslationFE, PresentationFE, 3DVisualizationFE,
                 ReportingEnabler, ControlPanelFE, ComputationOffloadingService,
                 RemoteManagementService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical twin via **ROS2 network** for intra-vehicle commands and **Wi-Fi** for remote management. Key outputs include:
  - **Desired speed commands** (sent via **Actuation FE** to the speed controller).
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) via **Control Panel User Interface FE**.
  The system adheres to **ISO 15622** for ACC control logic (performance class I), with actuation executed on the physical speed controller. End-to-end latency is constrained to **≤100 ms** for real-time safety-critical operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning operates at **real-time granularity** with a **twinning cycle frequency of ~100 ms** (aligned with 3GPP V2V communication requirements). Critical synchronization (e.g., clock accuracy) is maintained at **100 ms precision** to ensure deterministic event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensors (LiDAR, camera), actuators (speed controller), and **Data Pre-Processing FE** (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages **Data Collection FE**, **Reporting FE**, **ACC Controlling FE**, and **Data Storage** (SQL database).
  - **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization FE** and **Control Panel FE** for remote management.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity data alignment (ROS2/Wi-Fi communication). The architecture follows ISO 23247 entity-based structure but introduces the **Physical Twin Entity** as a domain-specific extension."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across two primary lifecycle stages:
  1) **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC system development, validation against ISO 15622 standards, and troubleshooting via data-driven insights.
  2) **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance during vehicle operation. The system does not explicitly cover a **Manufacturing Phase** (e.g., remote testing during production), as it focuses on retrofitted autonomous vehicle testing."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through:
  - **Real-time data streams** (LiDAR, ego state) with minimal latency (<100 ms).
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622 compliance for ACC control logic (performance class I).
  - **Validation**: Case-based generalization from real automotive projects (e.g., fuel economy optimization via DTs). Uncertainty is managed via sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera) and deterministic clock synchronization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs:
  - **Intra-vehicle Communication**: ROS2 network (ROS2-based ROS packages) for low-latency data exchange between sensors/actuators.
  - **Inter-entity Communication**: Wi-Fi network (UDP-based) for DT-to-PT interactions, ensuring **≤100 ms end-to-end latency**.
  - **Network Protocols**: ROS2 (for intra-vehicle) and Wi-Fi (for remote management). Clock synchronization is achieved via hardware-level precision (±100 ms)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed on:
  - **Onboard Hardware**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (for real-time processing) and Jetson NX (for sensor fusion).
  - **External Storage**: SQL databases (for data storage) hosted externally to the vehicle (e.g., cloud/edge servers).
  - **Remote Management**: Accessible via Wi-Fi-enabled UI (3D Visualization + Control Panel) for operators/developers."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: Not explicitly detailed in the case study, but could include V2V/V2I communication frameworks (e.g., 3GPP standards) for broader autonomous vehicle ecosystems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (entity-based structure) adapted for automotive DTs, with **Physical Twin Entity** added.
  - **ISO 15622**: ACC control logic (performance class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: V2V communication latency requirements (<100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Middleware for inter-entity communication and deployment."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed via:
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency to prevent catastrophic failures (e.g., delayed braking).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for deterministic event ordering.
  - **Remote Management**: Emergency braking commands are critical; no explicit mention of cybersecurity (e.g., encryption) but assumes secure Wi-Fi/Wi-Fi-based communication.
  - **Safety Validation**: ISO 15622 compliance ensures ACC system reliability. The system is designed for **Human-in-the-Loop** operation (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin category)."
]
